subcodes.first_line: A remembrance sent down from the Creator of heaven unto him who hath heard the Call and responded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر نزل من لدن فاطر السماء لمن سمع الندآء و اجاب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
